title: narcissus hispanicus var. propinquus
intro: Narcissus hispanicus var. propinquus, also known as the Spanish narcissus, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus hispanicus var. propinquus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for treating various health conditions.
